text: I feel an uncanny stillness in this dimly lit space, where functional forms and emergency signs catch the few glimmers of light. The silence amplifies the sense of isolation. In the second image, the words and screens hint at innovation and progress, yet everything is dormant and shrouded in darkness. I sense the potential for discovery, but I'm also haunted by an unease—what is the purpose of these places when no one is present to give them meaning?
